About

BLOCKCHAIN GAMING

DEVELOPED FOR MASS ADOPTION

Xai is built to enable open trade in the next generation of video games.

With Xai, potentially billions of traditional gamers can own and trade valuable in-game items in their favorite games for the first time, without the need to interact with crypto-wallets.

Proposals

Don’t forget to vote on the remaining two fresh proposals if you have voting power because they will expire in couple of days.

Xai operates as an Arbitrum Orbit chain, harnessing Anytrust technology to achieve maximum speed and minimal cost. Unlike most Orbit chains that are “self managed”, Xai benefits from direct technical support courtesy of the Offchain Labs

Open

The Xai network and ecosystem leverages XAI and esXAI (escrowed XAI) to bring balance and integrity to the ecosystem. XAI is the token of record for the Xai blockchain.

Open

esXAI is non-transferable and its utility is focused on staking for a variety of benefits.
esXAI is used to reward Sentry node operators and provide operators with a vari...

About

Xai boost a cononical bridge within the Arbitrum ecosystem. Additionally, Xai incorporates unique enhancements, including elevated gas and contract limits, which fosters a more favourable environment for ambitious blockchain game development and gameplay.

Open

The Xai network and ecosystem leverages XAI and esXAI (escrowed XAI) to bring balance and integrity to the ecosystem. XAI is the token of record for the Xai blockchain.
